---
title: "Table of Contents"
editor: visual
author: "Tokay Alberts"
---

## Course Lessons

-   [Cleaning and Wrangling Data](https://campliata.github.io/portfolio/assignments/a03.html)

-   [Data Visualization](https://campliata.github.io/portfolio/assignments/a05.html)

-   [Intro To Spatial Data](https://campliata.github.io/portfolio/assignments/intro-to-spatial-data.html)
